_comment: Custom jk1 LicenseBundleNormalizer rules, merged ahead of jk1's built-in bundle. Override the display names of jk1's CPL/LGPL bundles to stable, readable forms. Bundle names (CPL-1.0, LGPL-2.1-only, LGPL-3.0-only) must match jk1's built-in bundle names so our licenseName wins; jk1's default rules still map each dependency's raw POM license onto these bundles. Keep the licenseName values in sync with allowed-licenses.json and LICENSE_TEXT_FILE in cli/build.gradle.

bundles.licenseName: GNU Lesser General Public License, Version 2.1
GNU Lesser General Public License, Version 3.0
